info.name: Vehicle Tracking System API
info.description: Production-quality API testing collection for Welogical Vehicle Tracking System backend.

request.description: Endpoint returning API service info and active status.
Liveness and database connection status healthcheck.

body.raw:
{
  "device_uid": "ESP32-DEMO-001",
  "vehicle_name": "Toyota Corolla",
  "vehicle_type": "Sedan",
  "vehicle_number": "GJ05AB1234",
  "manufacturer": "Toyota",
  "model": "Corolla",
  "year": 2024,
  "vin": "1NXBR32E64Z123456",
  "imei": "864009040001234",
  "sim_number": "+919876543210",
  "fuel_type": "Petrol",
  "capacity": 50.0,
  "status": "Enabled",
  "notes": "ESP32 primary tracking unit test vehicle"
}

request.description: Registers a new tracking vehicle in the fleet management system.
Validates that submitting a duplicate device_uid returns HTTP 409 Conflict.
Lists all non-archived fleet tracking vehicles.
Retrieves the full profile metadata of a vehicle.
Updates profile configurations for a vehicle.
Soft-deletes a vehicle by transitioning its status to Archived.
Registers a new driver profile.
Lists all driver profiles.
Retrieves the full profile details of a driver.
Updates contact details of a driver.
Permanently deletes a driver from registry.
Establishes a tracking linkage mapping an active driver to a vehicle.
Gets current active assignment mapping for a vehicle.
Closes the current active assignment for a vehicle.
Retrieves the complete historical assignments log for a vehicle.
Logs a coordinates log payload, updating the vehicle's last_seen field.
Queries the most recent coordinates record for a vehicle.
Gets historical tracking coordinates range for a vehicle.
Lists all locations across all vehicles (Database explorer).
Ingests a telemetry packet conforming to the VTS Protocol Description.
Lists raw payloads captured in the debug monitor raw_packets registry.
Queues a new command for a device. Initial status is PENDING.
Lists historical queued commands.
Transitions a command status from PENDING to SENT.
Transitions command state to EXECUTED, triggering system events.
Transitions command state to FAILED.
Retrieves the historical audit log of transitions for a command.
Removes a command from the transmission queue.
Registers device/ingestion settings profile for a vehicle.
Retrieves the device configuration settings profile.
Updates hardware parameters for the device profile.
Deletes configurations profile registry.
Retrieves total event counts sliced by critical/warning/info severity levels.
Lists the most recent warnings and system alert events.
Lists historical trip logs generated for a vehicle.
Idempotently recalculates and regenerates all trips for a vehicle.
Retrieves analytics summary metrics including stop events and driver scores.
Retrieves playback coordinates list with downsampling logic.
Generates standard GeoJSON geometry for dashboard maps integrations.
Exports coordinate logs and speed metrics for a trip as a downloadable CSV.
Snaps custom coordinates to road network using the Google Routes snap cache.
